_comment: Overrides for games whose SteamSpy tags don't reflect actual engagement.

_substitute_notes.4000: Garry's Mod — 90%+ hours were EFT (Extreme Football Throwdown), a custom continuous-flow arena sport. Substitute Rocket League (252950) tags.
_substitute_notes.1207665: tModLoader — same game as Terraria (105600), modding hours.

manual_games.name: Planescape: Torment Enhanced Edition
manual_games._note: Canonical narrative/philosophical RPG. Dense text, reactive world, identity as theme.

manual_games.name: Return of the Obra Dinn
manual_games._note: Deductive mystery, constraint-satisfaction puzzle design, austere aesthetic.

manual_games.name: Outer Wilds
manual_games._note: Exploration-as-discovery, physics-based, knowledge gating over gear gating.

_manual_notes: Games not in Steam library (or underrepresented by playtime) that are known taste anchors. playtime_hours_equivalent sets their log-weight contribution to the profile.
